Name: Vol 00 — Executive Vision
Title: Executive Vision
Summary: The problem, thesis, principles operationalized, and glossary — the day-one read for a new hire.

Name: Vol 01 — Business Strategy
Title: Business Strategy
Summary: Public-benefit sustainability model, Florida go-to-market, partnerships, funding, and the business north star.

Name: Vol 02 — Market Research
Title: Market Research
Summary: Market sizing, competitive/adjacent landscape, regulatory landscape, and unmet needs — figures flagged as directional.

Name: Vol 03 — User Personas
Title: User Personas
Summary: Eleven personas with accessibility profiles and a persona-to-feature matrix, including victims and caregivers.

Name: Vol 04 — User Journeys
Title: User Journeys
Summary: Eight end-to-end journeys with happy and degraded paths, explainability moments, and verification handoffs.

Name: Vol 05 — Functional Requirements
Title: Functional Requirements
Summary: The exhaustive feature spec and the fixed verdict vocabulary, with persona/journey traceability.

Name: Vol 06 — UX Specification
Title: UX Specification
Summary: Every page, component, and interaction across desktop, tablet, and mobile, plus reusable component contracts.

Name: Vol 07 — Design System
Title: Design System
Summary: Tokens, color (light and dark), typography, motion, and the WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility contract.

Name: Vol 08 — AI Intelligence Engine
Title: AI Intelligence Engine
Summary: OCR, entity extraction, threat classification, campaign detection, explainability, moderation, and calibration.

Name: Vol 09 — Knowledge Graph
Title: Knowledge Graph
Summary: Postgres nodes and edges, confidence model, damped propagation, and campaign lifecycle logic.

Name: Vol 10 — Database
Title: Database
Summary: ER model, full table DDL, indexes, RLS policies, retention schedules, and migration strategy.

Name: Vol 11 — API Specification
Title: API Specification
Summary: REST /v1 endpoint catalog, auth and scopes, rate limits, error model, pagination, and versioning.

Name: Vol 12 — Frontend Architecture
Title: Frontend Architecture
Summary: Next.js routes, server/client component strategy, state, performance budget, and SEO/AI discoverability.

Name: Vol 13 — Backend Architecture
Title: Backend Architecture
Summary: Supabase topology, queues and background jobs, storage, notifications, and caching.

Name: Vol 14 — Security
Title: Security
Summary: Threat model, encryption, privacy, abuse prevention, audit logging, AI security, and responsible disclosure.

Name: Vol 15 — Testing
Title: Testing
Summary: Unit through E2E, accessibility and performance gates, security testing, AI evaluation, and the coverage matrix.

Name: Vol 16 — Operations
Title: Operations
Summary: Moderation operations, community, support, volunteer workflows, and transparency reporting.

Name: Vol 17 — Deployment
Title: Deployment
Summary: Environments, CI/CD, observability, logging, backups, and disaster recovery.

Name: Vol 18 — Analytics
Title: Analytics
Summary: North Star (Protective Actions Delivered), KPI tree, funnels, dashboards, and ethical experimentation.

Name: Vol 19 — Future Roadmap
Title: Future Roadmap
Summary: Browser extension, mobile, enterprise API, OCR, voice, deepfake detection, and internationalization.
